creator: tobez@tobez.org
text:
On Mon, Jul 30, 2001 at 06:58:01PM +0400, skv@protey.ru wrote:

> Update port: p5-POE-0.1501 (new version)

What would you say if I add dependencies on devel/p5-Term-ReadKey,
www/p5-libwww, archivers/p5-Compress-Zlib, and devel/p5-Event ?  The
port is so much more useful with these.  Of course, it is event more
useful with Tk, Gtk, and Curses, but this is probably an overkill.  :-)

=Anton.
-- 
May the tuna salad be with you.
